revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Awwal 2''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[ar:2 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:2 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:2 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:2 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:2 ربیع الاول]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Awwal 2''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[ar:2 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:2 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:2 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:2 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:2 ربیع الاول]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Rabi' al-Awwal}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Awwal 2''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[ar:2 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:2 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:2 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:2 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:2 ربیع الاول]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.text:

revision.text:
{{Islamic Rabi' al-Awwal}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Awwal 2''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[ar:2 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:2 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:2 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:2 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:2 ربیع الاول]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Islamic Rabi' al-Awwal}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Awwal 2''' is a day of the [[:en:Islamic calendar|Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[ar:2 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:2 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:2 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:2 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:2 ربیع الاول]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add wikidata link from Indonesian interwiki (Q4121365)
working on the date checking
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qqqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:2 ربيع الأول]][[ckb:٢ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]][[fa:۲ ربیع‌الاول]][[id:2 Rabiulawal]][[ms:2 Rabiulawal]][[pnb:2 ربیع الاول]][[sd:2 ربيع الاول]][[ur:2 ربیع الاول]] {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} {{Islamic Rabi' al-Awwal}}
'''Rabi' al-Awwal 2''' is a day of the [[:en:Islamic calendar|Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[ar:2 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:2 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:2 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:2 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:2 ربیع الاول]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]" to ""
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:2 ربيع الأول]][[ckb:٢ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]][[fa:۲ ربیع‌الاول]][[id:2 Rabiulawal]][[ms:2 Rabiulawal]][[pnb:2 ربیع الاول]][[sd:2 ربيع الاول]][[ur:2 ربیع الاول]] {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} {{Islamic Rabi' al-Awwal}}
'''Rabi' al-Awwal 2''' is a day of the [[:en:Islamic calendar|Islamic calendar]]. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[ar:2 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:2 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:2 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:2 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:2 ربیع الاول]] {{Islamic Calendar}}
[[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]]{{wikidata link|Q4121365}} [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]]
[[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]]
[[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]]
[[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Pages]] (crud category cleanup)
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:2 ربيع الأول]][[ckb:٢ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]][[fa:۲ ربیع‌الاول]][[id:2 Rabiulawal]][[ms:2 Rabiulawal]][[pnb:2 ربیع الاول]][[sd:2 ربيع الاول]][[ur:2 ربیع الاول]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:2 ربيع الأول]][[ckb:٢ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]][[fa:۲ ربیع‌الاول]][[id:2 Rabiulawal]][[ms:2 Rabiulawal]][[pnb:2 ربیع الاول]][[sd:2 ربيع الاول]][[ur:2 ربیع الاول]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:2 ربيع الأول]][[ckb:٢ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]][[fa:۲ ربیع‌الاول]][[id:2 Rabiulawal]][[ms:2 Rabiulawal]][[pnb:2 ربیع الاول]][[sd:2 ربيع الاول]][[ur:2 ربیع الاول]] {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} {{Islamic Rabi' al-Awwal}}
'''Rabi' al-Awwal 2''' is a day of the {{ill|Islamic calendar|en|Islamic calendar|WD=Q28892|lt=Islamic calendar|1=Islamic calendar}}. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[ar:2 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:2 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:2 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:2 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:2 ربیع الاول]] {{Islamic Calendar}} {{wikidata link|Q4121365}} [[Category:Days 2 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]]

'''Rabi' al-Awwal 2''' is a day of the {{ill|Islamic calendar|en|Islamic calendar|WD=Q28892|lt=Islamic calendar|1=Islamic calendar}}. It is the 2nd day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
